prerequisites: An Interzoid account, created by registering on the Interzoid platform.
An Interzoid API license key, available in the Account section of your Interzoid dashboard after signing in.
Values for the data fields the connector matches or standardizes: fullname, address, company, and org.
A matching algorithm selection for each of address_match_algorithm and company_match_algorithm.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single secret field, api_key, which holds your Interzoid API license key. Interzoid uses this key to authenticate requests and track usage. In Interzoid's own API calls the key is supplied as the license query parameter (for example license=YOUR_API_KEY).

setupSteps.title: Create an Interzoid account
setupSteps.body: Register for an account on the Interzoid platform. The account authenticates your requests and tracks your API usage.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your API license key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Interzoid, open the Account section of your dashboard, and copy your unique API license key. This value is what the connector stores in the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Configure credentials and data fields
setupSteps.body: In the connector configuration, set api_key to your Interzoid API license key. Then provide the data values the connector operates on: fullname, address, company, and org. All of these fields are required.

setupSteps.title: Select the matching algorithms
setupSteps.body: Set address_match_algorithm and company_match_algorithm to choose which Interzoid matching algorithm is applied to address and company data, respectively. Interzoid passes the chosen algorithm to its matching APIs (for example via an algorithm parameter such as model-v3-wide).

setupSteps.title: Verify the connection
setupSteps.body: Save the configuration and run a connection check. A successful check confirms the api_key is valid and the connector can reach Interzoid's matching and standardization streams (Company Name Matching, Individual Name Matching, Street Address Matching, and Standardize Company Names).
